languages.text: {n}Гальваническая батарея манипулуса нервно трещит.{/n} "Гипотеза... ошибочна? Но как? Это непостижимо! Или же... или же оступился я и сотворил ересь, помыслив, что постиг естество Бога-Машины, считая, что мы более простые создания, чем Он?"

{n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell crackles nervously.{/n} "My hypothesis is... is flawed? But how? It's inconceivable! Or... or have I strayed and committed heresy by believing that I had comprehended the nature of the Machine God, by thinking that we are simpler creatures than Him?"
languages.original_text: {n}Гальваническая батарея манипулуса нервно трещит.{/n} "Гипотеза... ошибочна? Но как? Это непостижимо! Или же... или же оступился я и сотворил ересь, помыслив, что постиг естество Бога-Машины, считая, что мы более простые создания, чем Он?"

Or... or have I strayed and committed heresy by believing that I had comprehended the nature of the Machine God, by thinking that we are simpler creatures than Him?"

{n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell crackles nervously.{/n} "My hypothesis is... is flawed? But how? It's inconceivable! Or... or have I strayed and committed heresy by believing that I had comprehended the nature of the Machine God, by thinking that we are simpler creatures than Him?"

{n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell crackles nervously.{/n} "My hypothesis is... is flawed? But how? It's inconceivable! Or... or have I strayed and committed heresy by believing that I had comprehended the nature of the Machine God, by thinking that we are simpler creatures than Him?"

languages.text: {n}マニピュラスの電解槽が不安げにパチパチと音を立てている。{/n}「私の仮説は...欠陥があるのか？でもどうして？考えられない！それとも...私、機械神の本質を理解したと思い込んで、我々を彼より単純な存在だと考えてしまったから、異端を犯してしまったのだろうか？」
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell crackles nervously.{/n} "My hypothesis is... is flawed? But how? It's inconceivable! Or... or have I strayed and committed heresy by believing that I had comprehended the nature of the Machine God, by thinking that we are simpler creatures than Him?"

traits.locale_text:
マニピュラスの電解槽が不安げにパチパチと音を立てている。
「私の仮説は...欠陥があるのか？でもどうして？考えられない！それとも...私、機械神の本質を理解したと思い込んで、我々を彼より単純な存在だと考えてしまったから、異端を犯してしまったのだろうか？」

languages.text: {n}操纵者的原电池因焦虑而噼啪作响。{/n}“我的假设……有缺陷？怎么可能？难以置信！难道……难道是我狂妄自大，自以为洞悉了万机之神的本质，以为他的造物也不过如此，从而误入歧途，犯下了异端之罪？”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell crackles nervously.{/n} "My hypothesis is... is flawed? But how? It's inconceivable! Or... or have I strayed and committed heresy by believing that I had comprehended the nature of the Machine God, by thinking that we are simpler creatures than Him?"

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者的原电池因焦虑而噼啪作响。{/n}“我的假设……有缺陷？怎么可能？难以置信！难道……难道是我狂妄自大，自以为洞悉了万机之神的本质，以为他的造物也不过如此，从而误入歧途，犯下了异端之罪？”

languages.text: {n}Les cellules galvaniques du manipulus crépitent nerveusement.{/n} « Mon hypothèse est... erronée ? Mais comment est-ce possible ? Non, c'est inconcevable ! À moins que... je me sois fourvoyé au point de commettre une hérésie en croyant que j'avais compris la nature du Dieu-Machine, en pensant que nous sommes des créatures plus simples que Lui ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell crackles nervously.{/n} "My hypothesis is... is flawed? But how? It's inconceivable! Or... or have I strayed and committed heresy by believing that I had comprehended the nature of the Machine God, by thinking that we are simpler creatures than Him?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Les cellules galvaniques du manipulus crépitent nerveusement.{/n} « Mon hypothèse est... erronée ? Mais comment est-ce possible ? Non, c'est inconcevable ! À moins que... je me sois fourvoyé au point de commettre une hérésie en croyant que j'avais compris la nature du Dieu-Machine, en pensant que nous sommes des créatures plus simples que Lui ? »

languages.text: {n}La célula galvánica del manipulus restalla con nerviosismo.{/n} «¿Mi hipótesis es... errónea? Pero ¿cómo? ¡Es inconcebible! O... ¿o me he desviado del camino y he cometido herejía al creer que había comprendido la naturaleza del Dios Máquina? ¿Al creer que éramos criaturas más simples que Él?».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell crackles nervously.{/n} "My hypothesis is... is flawed? But how? It's inconceivable! Or... or have I strayed and committed heresy by believing that I had comprehended the nature of the Machine God, by thinking that we are simpler creatures than Him?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La célula galvánica del manipulus restalla con nerviosismo.{/n} «¿Mi hipótesis es... errónea? Pero ¿cómo? ¡Es inconcebible! O... ¿o me he desviado del camino y he cometido herejía al creer que había comprendido la naturaleza del Dios Máquina? ¿Al creer que éramos criaturas más simples que Él?».

languages.text: {n}Manipülus'un galvanik hücresi, gergin bir şekilde çatırdıyor.{/n} "Hipotezim... kusurlu mu? Nasıl olur? Bu akıl almaz bir şey! Yoksa... Yoksa Makine Tanrı'nın doğasını kavradığıma inanarak, O'ndan daha basit yaratıklar olduğumuzu düşünerek yoldan sapıp kâfirlik mi ettim?"
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell crackles nervously.{/n} "My hypothesis is... is flawed? But how? It's inconceivable! Or... or have I strayed and committed heresy by believing that I had comprehended the nature of the Machine God, by thinking that we are simpler creatures than Him?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus'un galvanik hücresi, gergin bir şekilde çatırdıyor.{/n} "Hipotezim... kusurlu mu? Nasıl olur? Bu akıl almaz bir şey! Yoksa... Yoksa Makine Tanrı'nın doğasını kavradığıma inanarak, O'ndan daha basit yaratıklar olduğumuzu düşünerek yoldan sapıp kâfirlik mi ettim?"

languages.text: {n}Die galvanische Zelle des Manipulus flackert nervös.{/n} "Meine Hypothese ... ist fehlerhaft? Aber wie? Das ist unvorstellbar! Oder ... oder bin ich vom Weg abgekommen und habe Ketzerei betrieben, als ich glaubte, ich hätte die Natur des Maschinengottes erfasst, indem ich annahm, wir seien einfachere Kreaturen als Er?"
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus's galvanic cell crackles nervously.{/n} "My hypothesis is... is flawed? But how? It's inconceivable! Or... or have I strayed and committed heresy by believing that I had comprehended the nature of the Machine God, by thinking that we are simpler creatures than Him?"

Oder ... oder bin ich vom Weg abgekommen und habe Ketzerei betrieben, als ich glaubte, ich hätte die Natur des Maschinengottes erfasst, indem ich annahm, wir seien einfachere Kreaturen als Er?"
